payload.answer: The proposed memory uses an unresolved pronoun and is too ambiguous to save as durable memory without clarification.
repair_options: Clarify who “He” refers to and what “the other one” refers to, then propose a specific preference memory.
Do not save this memory because the subject and object are ambiguous.
Ask the user a follow-up question: “Who prefers which other one?”
